name: kigumi-vue-team
description: Example team registry: Vue-based Kigumi compositions. Demonstrates the cross-framework conversion flow used by `kigumi add --from <url> --cross-framework`.
author: Kigumi

login-example.name: LoginExample
login-example.description: Login form composed of Card, Input, Button, and Icon. Single-file Vue component with scoped script setup; inline styles only.
